---
title: "Abbeychurch, or, Self Control and Self Conceit."
---

## Abbeychurch, or, Self Control and Self Conceit.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1844
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** James Burns, Portman Street; London, and Henry Mozley and Sons, Derby.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
